alerts.title: Anthropic $30B ARR Milestone & Broadcom Infrastructure Deal
alerts.summary: Anthropic revenue run rate reached $30B, surpassing OpenAI outlook. New Broadcom agreement secures 3.5 GW of TPU capacity starting 2027. Strategic alignment with current market trends favoring large-scale AI investment.

alerts.title: Claude Code Source Leak: 512K Lines & Undercover Mode Exposed
alerts.summary: Claude Code TypeScript source (512,000 lines) accidentally shipped via npm. Undercover stealth coding mode and 44 hidden feature flags exposed. Competitive impact limited but architecture transparency accelerates harness engineering standardization.

alerts.title: Anthropic Discontinues OpenClaw via Subscription
alerts.summary: Claude subscription users lose OpenClaw (third-party agent tool) access. Migration required to API billing or pay-as-you-go model. Critical for tool dependency assessment.

alerts.title: OpenAI Deprecates GPT-4o Model Family
alerts.summary: GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 mini completely retired from ChatGPT and API. Migration to GPT-5.3 Instant / GPT-5.4 mini required. Deprecation timeline shortened to 6 months, increasing vendor lock-in risk.

key_items.title: forceRemoteSettingsRefresh Policy & Bedrock Setup Wizard
key_items.summary: v2.1.92 enforces remote settings refresh at startup (fail-closed). Bedrock interactive auth wizard for enterprise AWS deployments.

key_items.title: GPT-5.4 Release: Mini Model & Thinking Improvements
key_items.summary: GPT-5.4 mini brings 5.4-class capabilities to fast/efficient model. GPT-5.4 Thinking improves deep web research. Instant model auto-switch for all logged-in users.

key_items.title: Belitsoft Report: 12 Agents Average, 50% Disconnected
key_items.summary: Enterprises run avg 12 AI agents (20 by 2027 expected). Half operate in isolation. Integration challenges dominate (46%). Governance adoption still lagging.

key_items.title: AutoHarness v0.1.0: Automated Harness Engineering Framework
key_items.summary: AutoHarness released with 3-tier pipeline, 6-step governance, risk pattern matching, YAML constitution, trace diagnostics, multi-agent profiles, cost tracking.

key_items.title: MCP Reaches Production Readiness with 10K+ Servers
key_items.summary: 2,300+ public MCP servers. 10,000+ total by March 2026. Pinterest deploying internal MCP ecosystem at scale. 2026 roadmap: transport scalability, agent communication, enterprise governance (SSO, audit trails).

key_items.title: Cursor Composer 2 & AI Coding Stack Evolution
key_items.summary: Cursor Composer 2 (3rd-gen proprietary model) released 2026-03-19. Stack trend: Cursor daily + Claude Code complex tasks. GitHub Copilot adoption stalled (29% usage). Convergence on agentic capabilities across all three tools.

key_items.title: Databricks vs Snowflake: Data+AI Platform Consolidation
key_items.summary: Databricks: MosaicML suite evolution (Agent Bricks, Vector Search). Snowflake: Cortex AI + Arctic LLM open-sourced. Data+AI Summit 2026 conference (early-bird April 30 deadline). Market consolidating around 'data + AI' positioning.

key_items.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6: 1M Token Context Beta Retirement
key_items.summary: Beta header 'claude-context-1m-2025-08-07' loses effect 2026-04-30. Forced migration to Sonnet 4.6 / Opus 4.6 (standard pricing, 1M token native). Deprecation: Sonnet 3.7, Haiku 3.5.

key_items.title: Enterprise AI Security Maturation: Governance Gap Widening
key_items.summary: 40% cite security/compliance as primary adoption barrier. 46% struggle with system integration. Top priorities: security (34%), integration ease (30%), reliability (24%). 60% already deployed agents in production. Governance maturity lag creating risk.

key_items.title: Meta Engineering: Tribal Knowledge Extraction at Scale
key_items.summary: Meta used Claude for automatic documentation generation in large data pipelines. Knowledge mapping automation reducing handoff friction. Demonstrating practical value of agent-based knowledge work.

ceo_recommendations.title: Validate Anthropic API Dependency & Cost Model
ceo_recommendations.description: OpenClaw subscription discontinuation and API billing changes may impact cost structure. Audit current Anthropic service usage and billing model. Prepare migration plan if pay-as-you-go escalation occurs.

ceo_recommendations.title: Plan Claude Sonnet 4.6 Migration (Deadline: 2026-04-30)
ceo_recommendations.description: 1M token context beta retirement requires migration to Sonnet 4.6 or Opus 4.6. If long-context processing is critical to operations, budget testing and validation before April 30.

ceo_recommendations.title: Market 'Agent Governance' as IP Differentiation
ceo_recommendations.description: 50% of enterprises face multi-agent coordination challenges. Our hook+CLAUDE.md+department-agent design is clearly ahead of industry average. Develop white papers, case studies, or governance templates as marketing assets.

ceo_recommendations.title: Competitive Response to Cursor Composer 2
ceo_recommendations.description: Cursor's new model (released 2026-03-19) shifts IDE-based coding landscape. Reassess tool stack positioning for clients: terminal-native agentic (Claude Code) vs IDE-embedded (Cursor) tradeoffs.

ceo_recommendations.title: Explore Databricks + AI Agent Integration Opportunities
ceo_recommendations.description: Large enterprises want bundled 'data platform + multi-agent orchestration'. Databricks Data+AI Summit (April) is prime networking opportunity. Consider partnership exploration or solution architecture development.

ceo_recommendations.title: Pre-emptive MCP Enterprise Features (H2 2026)
ceo_recommendations.description: MCP 2026 roadmap includes audit trails, SSO auth, enterprise governance. Equip internal MCP servers with these features ahead of industry standard adoption. 'Enterprise-ready MCP' positioning can provide market advantage.
